name: Tommy Sheehan
signature_move: Tommy convinced Lauren Beck to use her hidden immunity idol on him at Final 5 instead of saving it for herself — a masterclass in social manipulation that secured his path to Final Tribal Council without ever finding an idol or advantage himself.
strategy_summary: Tommy won through pure social and strategic play without ever possessing a hidden immunity idol or advantage — a rarity in modern Survivor. As a 4th grade teacher, he used his natural warmth and ability to connect with people of all backgrounds to build unshakeable bonds. He was the last winner of the 39-day format before the show switched to 26 days.
fun_fact: Tommy is the only winner in the 30s era of Survivor to win without playing a single idol or advantage, proving that old-school social gameplay can still triumph in the modern era.
